mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in RSAFS signals resilient household demand and upward earnings revisions for consumer-facing firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by lower 20-day S&P 500 returns than lower RSAFS growth in more than 60% of walk-forward monthly samples.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses above 2.5% while CPIAUCSL is still rising over 3 months, tighter policy and persistent inflation raise discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 2.5% and CPIAUCSL 3-month change is positive
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with elevated inflation
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered mean returns exceed non-triggered mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: UNRATE below 4% combined with slowing PAYEMS growth identifies a late-cycle labor squeeze in which margins weaken before layoffs rise, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE < 4.0% and PAYEMS 3-month growth is below its prior 3-month growth
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with tight labor markets
failure_condition: Reject if triggered 60-day S&P 500 returns are not below unconditional 60-day returns, or if the signal hit rate for negative returns is below 50% over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A downside break in INDPRO signals weakening real production and revenue momentum for cyclicals, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as markets price growth risk.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside-crossing events are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in HOUST below trend leads weaker construction activity, durable-goods demand, and credit creation, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST below-trend triggers do not produce lower average 60-day S&P 500 returns than HOUST above-trend periods in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Acceleration in CPIAUCSL above its own trailing trend signals renewed inflation pressure that reduces real earnings quality and delays policy easing, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation crosses above its trailing 12-month inflation rate
failure_condition: Reject if CPIAUCSL acceleration triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of events or show a nonnegative return spread versus non-triggers.

mechanism_narrative: Higher quarter-over-quarter growth in GDPC1 signals broad real demand strength and rising aggregate cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher GDPC1 growth has a negative walk-forward Rank IC with 60-day S&P 500 returns over two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: During a FEDFUNDS uptrend, strong RSAFS growth increases the expected policy path more than it improves near-term earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger does not underperform the RSAFS-growth-only signal over 20 trading days, or if its triggered mean return is positive in walk-forward testing.
